items.title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
items.summary: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
items.summary: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

items.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
items.summary: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

items.title: AI Kill Switch Act would let Trump admin order shutdown of rogue AI systems
items.summary: Bill would let Homeland Security chief decide when an AI should be shut down.
